title: Monday Doc to be filled out in field using mobile (andriod) phone
excerpt: We are using the Monday Docs column to create an inspection form that can be filled out on a jobsite with a field member.  The creation of the document is time consuming because we cannot make a template to reuse the sam…

posts.author: CraigWilliamson (Craig Willilamson)
posts.cookedHtml: We are using the Monday Docs column to create an inspection form that can be filled out on a jobsite with a field member. The creation of the document is time consuming because we cannot make a template to reuse the same text on each item line. So,we manually load the items to inspect on the docs page, and send our team out in to the field to complete the task of inspecting and documenting the inspection. Our issue now is that the monday docs is a “read only” document on Android Devices. The document can be filled in with an IOS device though. Is there a plan to allow andriod devices to fill in a monday doc?
